summary: Phase 55 — Tail Fragility Engine backend testing completed successfully. All 21 specific tests pass, full test suite passes with 1528 tests (no regressions), fail-soft behavior verified, integration with fragility_calibrator confirmed, backward compatibility maintained.
passed_tests: pytest tests/: 1528/1528 PASS (1517 original + 11 new, no regressions)
compute_tail_fragility never raises (fail-soft with None/malformed payload)
explosive_tail_score formula verified: p12*0.30 + p14*0.30 + p16*0.25 + p18*0.15, normalized 0-100
bucket thresholds verified: LOW [0-24], MEDIUM [25-49], HIGH [50-74], EXTREME [75+]
interactions ONLY fire when tail_bucket >= HIGH (verified with LOW/MEDIUM buckets)
cap at +20 respected with TAIL_FRAGILITY_CAP_HIT code when applicable
fragility_calibrator with tail_fragility provided uses it (no double counting with legacy p_ge_12)
fragility_calibrator without tail_fragility provided uses legacy p_ge_12 logic (backward compat)
Cole vs Cecconi spec case verified: hits +20 cap correctly
p_ge_18 added to compute_tail_risk in mlb_expected_runs_distribution.py
Backend logs clean (no errors related to tail_fragility)
mlb_day_orchestrator.py correctly computes and persists tail_fragility in pick_payload
mlb_day_orchestrator.py correctly passes tail_fragility to calibrate_fragility

success_percentage.frontend: N/A (backend only testing per review request)
